explanation.summary: Proteins are carrying this food most, while vitamins are the biggest drag. It lands in A tier.
explanation.whyThisTier: This food lands in A tier with an overall score of 68 from a base nutrition score of 68. Context barely changed the result.

topPros.title: useful staple energy source
topPros.explanation: That matters because grains are often judged by how practical they are in real diets.

topPros.title: works as a meal anchor
topPros.explanation: A lot of value comes from being easy to build around.

topCons.title: protein quality is limited
topCons.explanation: Even the better grains usually need pairing.

topCons.title: carb load is still the main burden
topCons.explanation: That is the category risk no grain fully escapes.

topCons.title: quality can drop fast with processing
topCons.explanation: The grain category punishes refinement pretty hard.

closing.summary: Buckwheat stands out for useful staple energy source and works as a meal anchor. but it also gets held back by protein quality is limited and carb load is still the main burden. Best when you want a staple carb that actually brings something useful with it.

reviewChecklist: Verify nutrient values are sourced well enough for publishable use.
Review narration for category repetition and trim any awkward lines.
Confirm subtitle density stays readable at phone speed.
Replace placeholder hero/sprite art with final asset selection.
Check that the final tier verdict feels editorially defensible.
nextHumanStep: Review the generated narration + manifest, then use the manifest as the handoff into visual assembly / editing.
